title: [Apache Flink 1.6.4 Released](</2019/02/25/apache-flink-1.6.4-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.6.4 Released
February 25, 2019 -
The Apache Flink community released the fourth bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.6 series.
This release includes more than 25 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.6.3. The list below…
